RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0027 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Priya Mensah Date of Birth: 24/04/1984 SSN (tokenized): TKN-115448 Annual Income: $111,000 Employer: Initech Loan Amount: $24,000 Term (months): 72 Branch: Pune Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN99677AL Hyundai Elantra 2019 EV CPO 17,000 Authorized Signature: Priya Mensah
